⭐Our Premium Offering
The Star Package ⭐
Your fully customized, fully curated, fully executed celebration. We handle everything — from the vision board to the last balloon. You show up gorgeous, soak in every second, and let us make the magic happen.
  • ✦Full event planning & day-of coordination
  • ✦Custom decor design & full curation
  • ✦Vendor sourcing & management
  • ✦All custom graduation print products
  • ✦Personal Yearbook included
  • ✦Run of show & timeline management

Because your grad deserves nothing less.
